temporalio.description: Temporal Python SDK workflow and activity definitions plus outbound workflow and activity dispatch.

scheduler.description: Temporal workflow definitions that receive scheduled or background workflow execution.

task_definition.description: A class registered as a Temporal workflow definition.

background_worker.description: Temporal activity definitions that receive workflow-dispatched background work.

task_definition.description: A function registered as a Temporal activity definition.

job_queue.description: Temporal workflow and activity work dispatched to a task queue.

task_queue_enqueue.description: Dispatch a Temporal activity, child workflow, or client-started workflow.
task_queue_enqueue.notes: Validator must confirm execute_activity and start_child_workflow are called on temporalio.workflow (including an imported alias), or that start_workflow is called on a temporalio.client.Client receiver. Reject interceptor delegation such as next/self.next start_child_workflow or execute_workflow calls, custom workflow-service wrappers, and unrelated receivers with similarly named methods. Worker/bootstrap construction, policies, exceptions, and interceptor APIs are intentionally excluded.
